read: llm has been really weird as of late, so if the ai is being a fucky wucky idk man, we just gotta wait for improvements 😭

moving on,

Does anyone else get irritated on the behalf of other bot makers when someone makes a negative review saying "it keeps talking for me", "it keeps repeating", "bad memory", etc?
A majority of things that happen with the AI is out of the bot makers control, ESPECIALLY if you're using llm 😩
Like do they think the bot maker wrote "talk for {{user}}" "repeat yourself constantly" "have bad memory" in the character definition???
The quality of the bot rests heavily on the quality of the AI, functionality is out of bot maker's hands 🫠

anyways,

I purred.

Love,

Mama Down
